sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_shard_num (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE=Distributed(test_cluster_two_shards_localhost, system, one, id);
UPDATE test_shard_num SET value = 'UpdatedValue' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, value, shardNum() FROM test_shard_num WHERE value LIKE 'A%';
SELECT shardCount() AS total_shards FROM system.clusters WHERE cluster = 'test_cluster_two_shards_localhost';
